current_goal: Re-plan the implementation of a dynamically changing superhero mask overlay.

current_plan.description: A real-time web application that applies a dynamically changing, stylized superhero mask overlay onto a live video feed from the user's camera.
current_plan.architecture: Client-side rendering using React and the HTML Canvas/WebGL API for video processing and overlay drawing.

files.purpose: Main component handling state, camera initialization, and rendering the video feed and mask.
Component responsible for accessing the camera stream and drawing the raw video frames onto a canvas element.
Core logic module containing functions to calculate, draw, and update the mask overlay based on time or state.
Global styling for the video container and overlay elements.

subtasks.name: Phase 1: Project Setup and Video Input
subtasks.description: Initialize the React project and successfully capture and display the live camera feed.

subtasks.name: Phase 2: Basic Mask Overlay Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement the static mask drawing logic on top of the video canvas. The mask should cover a fixed area (e.g., the face region).

subtasks.name: Phase 3: Dynamic Mask Behavior
subtasks.description: Implement the logic for the mask to change its appearance (e.g., color, shape, pulsation) over time using animation loops (requestAnimationFrame).

subtasks.name: Phase 4: Optimization and Polish
subtasks.description: Refactor the rendering loop for performance, ensuring smooth frame rates and adding user controls (e.g., toggle mask, change mask type).
